project_summary.estimator_summary: Secure analysis extracted 149 opening(s) and 8 hardware set(s). Verify against source PDF before bidding.

missing_or_unclear_items: hardware set referenced by doors but not found in spec

general_notes: A. ALL DOOR FRAMES SHALL RECIEVER PRIMER COAT PLUS TWO FINISH COATS OF APPROPRIATE SEMI-GLOSS ENAMEL PAINT.
B. ALL GLASS TO BE 1/2" CLEAR TEMP, UNO
C. ALL HARDWARE SETS TO BE LEVER STYLE AND MATCH BUILDING STANDARD, UNO
D. ALL HARDWARE TO COMPLY WITH APPLICABLE ANSI AND ADA GUIDELINES FOR ACCESSIBILITY
E. GENERAL CONTRACTOR TO COORDINATE ALL HARDWARE INSTALLATIONS WITH TENANT SECURITY VENDOR
F. GENERAL CONTRACTOR TO COORDINATE LOCKSET MASTER KEYING WITH TENANT AND BUILDING LANDLORD. GENERAL CONTRACTOR TO MATCH BUILDING KEYWAY STANDARD
G. GENERAL CONTRACTOR TO MOUNT ALL DOOR CLOSERS ON NON-PUBLIC SIDE OF DOOR. CLOSER PUSH/PULL FORCE TO MEET ADA REQUIREMENTS
H. HEIGHT OF ALL LATCHSETS / LOCKSETS WITHIN THE CENTER TO MEET BUILDING STANDARD
I. ALL STAINED GRADE DOORS TO MATCH ARCHITECT'S SAMPLE
J. THE THRESHOLD AT ALL FLOOR TRANSITIONS MUST BE LEVEL TO 2% OR LESS
K. ALL WOOD DOOR FRAMING AND CONSTRUCTION SHALL BE FIRE RETARDANT IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE CURRENT CODE.
L. IF INTERIOR FRAMES ARE ALUMINUM, DELETE SILENCES. SEALS BY FRAME MANUFACTURER
M. IF INTERIOR FRAMES ARE ALUMINUM, DELETE HEAVY WEIGHT HINGES AND USE STANDARD WEIGHT
N. WHERE WALL OR FLOOR STOPS ARE NOT FEASIBLE, USE RIXSON 9 SERIES OVERHEAD STOP
O. DOORS OVER 90" IN HEIGHT REQUIRE AN ADDITIONAL HINGE. DOORS OVER 36" IN WIDTH REQUIRE 5" X 4.5" HINGES
P. DOORS WITH EXTERIOR FACE SHEETS FORMED OF COLD ROLLED A-36, 16-GAUGE STEEL. INTERIOR HOLLOW METAL DOORS ARE TO HAVE C OLD ROLLED FACE SHEETS OF 18-GAUGE STEEL.
Q. PROVIDE GRADE-1 DOOR HARDWARE TO ALL EXTERIOR HOLLOW METAL DOORS AND EXITS
R. THE HARDWARE QUALITY SHALL BE HEAVY DUTY, SCHLAGE 'D' - SERIES HARDWARE OR EQUAL. REFER TO SPECS FOR DOOR INFORMATION
1. ALL DOOR FRAMES SHALL RECIEVE PRIMER COAT PLUS TWO FINISH COATS OF APPROPRIATE SEMI-GLOSS ENAMEL PAINT.
2. ALL OVERHEAD DOORS TO HAVE FACTORY PAINTED FINISH IN MANUFACTURER'S STANDARD "WHITE" COLOR.
3. OVERHEAD DOORS TRACKS SHALL BE HEAVY DUTY, GALVANIZED WITH SPRING STEEL BUMPERS
hardware_preamble: A. ALL DOOR FRAMES SHALL RECIEVER PRIMER COAT PLUS TWO FINISH COATS OF APPROPRIATE SEMI-GLOSS ENAMEL PAINT.
B. ALL GLASS TO BE 1/2" CLEAR TEMP, UNO

3. OVERHEAD DOORS TRACKS SHALL BE HEAVY DUTY, GALVANIZED WITH SPRING STEEL BUMPERS

project_risks.issue: 1 hardware set(s) referenced by 1 door(s) have no extracted line items.
project_risks.recommendation: Locate full hardware set definitions; carry as allowance until confirmed.

project_risks.issue: 1 fire-rated opening(s) require coordinated UL-listed door, frame and hardware assemblies.
project_risks.recommendation: Confirm labels, positive latching, closers and gasketing requirements.

rfi_log.question: Provide the complete line-item list for hardware set(s): <varies>.

estimator_notes: Keying notes captured from the drawings (1 line(s)); verify keyway, master structure, cylinder format and key counts.
149 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
8 hardware set(s) identified; 7 have a complete extracted item list.
21 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
20 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
allowances_to_consider: Allowance for fire-rated assembly coordination, S-label gasketing and any UL field-modification charges.
coordination_items: Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
